mapper.select: SELECT wo.*, u.nickname AS assignee_name FROM work_order wo LEFT JOIN user u ON wo.assignee_id = u.id WHERE wo.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_order (plan_id, product_name, quantity, assignee_id, process_requirement, delivery_date, status, actual_quantity, complete_time) VALUES (#{planId}, #{productName}, #{quantity}, #{assigneeId}, #{processRequirement}, #{deliveryDate}, #{status}, #{actualQuantity}, #{completeTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE work_order SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_order WHERE status = #{status}
